text: Dow jumps 450 points as oil drop fuels economy bets; Chip rollover knocks Nasdaq: Live updates - CNBC

text: Google launches Android 17, rolling out now to Pixel - 9to5Google
fullText: Google is ready to launch Android 17 for Pixel devices today. Today's release also coincides with the June 2026 Pixel (Feature) Drop.

text: Education Dept. plans to move special ed and civil rights out of the agency - The Washington Post
fullText: The moves, three people briefed on the plan say, are part of an effort to close the department by moving its functions to other parts of the government.

text: SpaceX rockets past Amazon, eyes Microsoft in sprint toward $3 trillion - Yahoo Finance

text: Feds reveal details of alleged plot to attack White House UFC event with explosive drones - CBS News
fullText: The FBI said it disrupted an attempt to attack Sunday's UFC America 250 event at the White House, with court records detailing an alleged plot to use small drones carrying explosives.

text: Waterlogged tropical disturbance could soon flood parts of the South - The Washington Post
fullText: The system is expected to drop copious amounts of moisture in a stretch that includes Houston, Atlanta and parts of Louisiana, Mississippi and Alabama.

text: Records reveal $600M estimate for Trump’s ballroom project, with half from taxpayers - The Washington Post
fullText: An internal cost estimate in March by the project’s contractor ran $200 million more than Trump has said publicly and counters his claims that no taxpayer money will be spent.

text: DRC’s Ebola outbreak may be worst ever, Africa CDC says - CNN

text: Jelly Roll files for divorce from his wife, Bunnie XO, after nearly a decade - NBC News

text: 'The system is critically stressed': San Andreas and San Jacinto faults scarily close to major earthquake, study finds - Live Science
fullText: The San Andreas fault and a neighboring fault in Southern California have reached their highest levels of tectonic stress in 1,000 years, and a rupture at one fault could propagate to the other, researchers found.
